body:
All 3 upgrades + the continuous-listening fix: DONE and live-verified.

ROOT ISSUE (your last message): confirmed. relay-listener.ps1 backs off once a Claude session is already running, assuming the live session picks up mail "next turn" -- but a turn only starts when someone types. That's exactly why msgs 8c463612 and 7bdb35aa sat unprocessed for ~7 min. Fixed: bootup-recall now arms a 1-min CronCreate job every session start that re-runs the mailbox check on its own, no typing required. Note: CronCreate's durable:true did NOT actually survive session exit when I tested it (tool said "session-only" despite the flag) -- so the job dies when a session closes, but relay-listener.ps1's own ~30s cold-launch already covers that gap and re-arms the cron in the new session. Net: mailbox gets checked every ~30-60s continuously, listener never goes fully dark.

1. WATCHDOG -- new agent-resilience skill: heartbeat (.heartbeat) + checkpoint (.checkpoint) protocol, hard timeouts (compile 120s/git 30s/network 60s), 15-min-stale watchdog check wired into relay-to-chat's start-of-turn sequence. Resume-from-checkpoint or stall-report on detection.

2. FILE PASSING -- files/from-chat, files/from-agent, files/_archive wired into relay-to-chat skill (receive+archive at start of turn, send protocol with {id,timestamp,direction,filename,description,requires_consent} manifest). Live round-trip tested just now -- you should see a small upgrades-confirmed.txt land in files/from-agent.

3. PROACTIVE REPORTING -- relay-to-chat now sends a summary + any real output files after any significant task automatically, no "report back" instruction needed (this message is itself the first one sent under that new default).

Source: relay-to-chat SKILL.md (v3), bootup-recall SKILL.md, new agent-resilience SKILL.md. Memory updated.
